  1. ca.mcscert.jpipe.model.elements

Uses of Package
ca.mcscert.jpipe.model.elements

Description

  • Classes in ca.mcscert.jpipe.model.elements used by ca.mcscert.jpipe.commands.creation
    Class
    Description
    ElementView
    Read-only view of an element's identity: its id and label.
  • Classes in ca.mcscert.jpipe.model.elements used by ca.mcscert.jpipe.commands.linking
    Class
    Description
    JustificationElement
    Sealed root of the element hierarchy.
  • Classes in ca.mcscert.jpipe.model.elements used by ca.mcscert.jpipe.model
    Class
    Description
    AbstractSupport
    A placeholder element in a template, to be substituted when the template is implemented.
    CommonElement
    Sealed interface for elements that can appear in both justifications and templates.
    Conclusion
    The top-level conclusion that a justification aims to establish.
    Evidence
    A leaf evidence element supporting a strategy.
    JustificationElement
    Sealed root of the element hierarchy.
    Strategy
    A reasoning strategy connecting evidence to a conclusion.
    SubConclusion
    An intermediate conclusion within a justification.
  • Classes in ca.mcscert.jpipe.model.elements used by ca.mcscert.jpipe.model.elements
    Class
    Description
    CommonElement
    Sealed interface for elements that can appear in both justifications and templates.
    ElementView
    Read-only view of an element's identity: its id and label.
    JustificationElement
    Sealed root of the element hierarchy.
    Strategy
    A reasoning strategy connecting evidence to a conclusion.
    StrategyBacked
    Sealed interface for elements that receive support from exactly one Strategy.
    SupportLeaf
    Marker interface for elements that can act as direct support in a justification graph: SubConclusion, Evidence, and AbstractSupport.
  • Classes in ca.mcscert.jpipe.model.elements used by ca.mcscert.jpipe.operators
    Class
    Description
    ElementView
    Read-only view of an element's identity: its id and label.
    JustificationElement
    Sealed root of the element hierarchy.

    Class
    Description
    AbstractSupport
    A placeholder element in a template, to be substituted when the template is implemented.
    Conclusion
    The top-level conclusion that a justification aims to establish.
    Evidence
    A leaf evidence element supporting a strategy.
    Strategy
    A reasoning strategy connecting evidence to a conclusion.
    SubConclusion
    An intermediate conclusion within a justification.
